item.g:title: Dog Toy – Dog Chew Toy Choke-proof Food Dispenser – Safe Chewing
item.g:description: Keep your dog entertained and mentally stimulated with this choke-proof chew toy and food dispenser. Made from food-grade silicone for safe, durable chewing. Fill with treats to slow feeding and reduce boredom. Honeycomb texture massages gums and cleans teeth during play. Easy to clean and dishwasher safe.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Dog Supplies > Dog Toys

item.g:title: Cat Toy – Cat Fish Toy – Durable Jute Squeaky Toy for Indoor Cats – Built to Last
item.g:description: Give your cat a realistic fish toy made from natural jute for hours of self-entertainment. Squeaky design triggers hunting instincts and keeps cats engaged. Durable construction withstands batting, biting, and bunny kicks. Helps reduce stress and boredom in indoor cats. Lightweight and easy to toss.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Cat Supplies > Cat Toys

item.g:title: Enclosed Cat Litter Box – GetPawsy Enclosed Cat Litter Box – Extra Large Flip-Top Design – Enclosed Privacy | Extra Large
item.g:description: Extra large enclosed cat litter box with a flip-top lid for quick cleaning access. Deep base contains litter scatter, and the enclosed design provides privacy that many cats prefer. Sized for large breeds including Maine Coons. The flip-top opens fully so you can scoop, change litter, or clean the interior without removing the entire lid. Includes a litter scoop.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Cat Supplies > Litter Boxes

item.g:title: Dog Bed – GetPawsy Elevated Cooling Dog Bed – Breathable Outdoor Pet Cot – Maximum Comfort
item.g:description: Keep your dog comfortable in warm weather with this elevated cooling cot. The breathable mesh sleeping surface promotes airflow from all sides. The raised frame lifts your pet off hot or cold floors, making it suitable for indoor and outdoor use. Easy to assemble and clean — ideal for medium to large dogs.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Dog Supplies > Dog Beds

item.g:title: GetPawsy Portable Dog Stroller – Foldable Travel Carrier for Dogs for Dogs – Travel Ready
item.g:description: Help senior, recovering, or small dogs enjoy the outdoors with this portable pet stroller. The foldable aluminum frame is lightweight for transport and storage. Mesh windows provide ventilation and visibility while keeping your pet secure. All-terrain wheels handle pavement, grass, and gravel paths.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Pet Strollers

item.g:title: Dog Bed – Dog Car Bed – Widened Support Plate Rear Seat Travel Pad for Dogs – Travel Ready
item.g:description: A widened support plate transforms your car's rear seat into a stable resting area for your dog during road trips. The padded surface provides cushioned comfort while the reinforced edges help contain your pet. Fits most standard sedans and SUVs.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Dog Supplies > Dog Beds

item.g:title: GetPawsy Natural Pear Wood Cat Tree – Multi-Level Tower with Sisal Scratching Posts for Cats – Natural Scratching
item.g:description: Multi-level cat tree made from natural pear wood with sisal scratching posts and soft resting surfaces. Includes elevated perches and play elements for climbing, scratching, and lounging. Stable design for indoor cats.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Cat Supplies > Cat Trees

item.g:title: GetPawsy UFO Cat Tree Condo – 49 Inch Activity Center with Sisal Posts for Cats – Natural Scratching
item.g:description: 49-inch cat activity center with elevated perch, enclosed capsule-style rest area, hammock, and sisal scratching posts. Designed for climbing, scratching, and lounging indoors. Multi-level structure for active cats.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Cat Supplies > Cat Trees

item.g:title: Automatic Cat Litter Box – GetPawsy Automatic Cat Litter Box – Self-Cleaning with App Control – Everyday Comfort
item.g:description: Simplify litter box maintenance with this 60L self-cleaning unit. An infrared sensor detects when your cat exits before starting the cleaning cycle. Control schedules and monitor usage from your smartphone. The built-in odor management system helps keep your home fresh. Designed for multi-cat households.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Cat Supplies > Litter Boxes

item.g:title: Enclosed Cat Litter Box – GetPawsy Enclosed Cat Litter Box – XL Stainless Steel Flip Top for Large Cats – Enclosed Privacy | XL
item.g:description: An XL stainless steel litter box with a flip-top lid and a built-in step. The stainless steel construction resists odor absorption and stains. The step platform catches loose litter before it reaches your floor. Designed for large cats or multi-cat households.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Cat Supplies > Litter Boxes

item.g:title: GetPawsy Expandable Pet Carrier Backpack – Breathable Travel Bag for Small Dogs & Cats for Dogs – Travel Ready | Small
item.g:description: Expandable pet carrier backpack with mesh ventilation panels and a zip-out expansion area. Designed for small dogs and cats up to 15 lbs. The padded shoulder straps distribute weight evenly for comfortable walks, hikes, and travel. Side pockets hold treats and waste bags. The transparent window lets your pet see out while staying safely contained.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Dog Supplies > Dog Carriers & Travel

item.g:title: Cat Litter Box – GetPawsy Hidden Cat Litter Box Enclosure – Furniture with Scratching Board – Natural Scratching
item.g:description: Conceal your cat's litter box inside a furniture-style enclosure that blends into your living space. Tall legs keep the unit elevated for easy cleaning beneath. The built-in side scratching board gives your cat a designated scratching spot. A spacious interior fits most standard litter boxes.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Cat Supplies > Litter Boxes

item.g:title: Enclosed Cat Litter Box – GetPawsy Enclosed Cat Litter Box – Extra Large Front Entry with Litter Catching Lid – Maximum Comfort | Extra Large
item.g:description: An extra-large enclosed litter box with a front-entry opening and a litter-catching lid. The top surface traps stray litter as your cat exits. Roomy interior accommodates larger cats comfortably. Easy to disassemble for thorough cleaning.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Cat Supplies > Litter Boxes

item.g:title: GetPawsy Cactus Cat Climbing Tree – All-in-One Condo with Cozy Nest for Cats – Natural Scratching
item.g:description: A cactus-shaped cat climbing tree with an all-in-one design: scratching surfaces, a cozy nest, and elevated perch. The playful shape adds personality to your space while giving your cat a dedicated climbing and resting structure.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Cat Supplies > Cat Trees

item.g:title: GetPawsy Cactus Cat Tree – 2-in-1 Scratching Post with Solid Wood Base for Cats – Natural Scratching
item.g:description: Cactus-style cat tree with sisal scratching surface, solid wood base, and hanging toy. Compact design for indoor cats that enjoy scratching and light climbing. Suitable for everyday enrichment and play.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Cat Supplies > Cat Trees

item.g:title: GetPawsy Modern Cat Tree – 35-Inch Wooden Scratching Tower with Bed for Cats – Natural Scratching
item.g:description: A compact, modern cat tree that fits smaller living spaces without compromising on functionality. Features wooden scratching surfaces that resist wear, an elevated sleeping platform, and a stable multi-level layout. Designed for adult indoor cats who enjoy climbing and perching.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Cat Supplies > Cat Trees

item.g:title: GetPawsy Elevated Cat Tree – Sisal Scratching Post with Bed & Basket for Cats – Natural Scratching
item.g:description: Compact elevated cat tree with a woven basket-style bed and sisal scratching post. Designed for indoor cats who like to lounge, scratch, and play. Space-saving size for smaller rooms or apartments.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Cat Supplies > Cat Trees
